enrichment.architecture_explanation: No container was detected and the codebase is a small, single-entrypoint script, which fits AWS Lambda's event-driven model far better than a continuously running service.
enrichment.cost_summary: At an assumed light, intermittent invocation pattern this function is estimated at $0.85/month (range: $0.68-$1.02), well within typical serverless budgets.
enrichment.finops_justification: No Spot/Reserved/Graviton recommendation applies to Lambda pricing directly; Graviton (arm64) architecture is suggested to reduce per-millisecond compute cost at no operational risk.
